title: Testbook Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Testbook Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Testbook Capital India family as a Subject Matter Expert in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Testbook Capital India:
Testbook Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook Capital India!
